hero.title: Engineering Systems That Scale
hero.subtitle: Enterprise Software · AI kei na Vuli ni Misini · iYauqaqa ni O · IoT kei na Edge
hero.description: Mai na gacagaca vuku ki na vatavata ni o, eda tuvanaka ka solia na tekinolaji e vakaukauwataka na bisinisi cecere — ena kena gauna, ena ilavo vakailavo, ena kena ivakatagedegede.
hero.trustLine: Nuitaki mai vei ira na kabani e vuravura raraba

services.subtitle: Noda Veiqaravi
services.title: Idinia ni Spectrum Taucoko
services.description: Ono na vanua ni vakatovotovo. Dua na timi. Na veitabana kece ni nomu stack ni tekinolaji — mai na gacagaca ni yasana ki na dashboard ni bisinisi.

customSoftware.title: Vakatorocaketaki ni parokaramu ni parokaramu
customSoftware.description: Na ivolakerekere vou e tarai vata kei na microservices, APIs, kei na iyaloyalo ni o.

aiMl.title: AI, ML & Business Intelligence
aiMl.description: AI/ML pipelines, Power BI dashboards, kei na analytics torocake e vukica na itukutuku ki na vakatulewa.

cloud.title: Architecture kei na iYauqaqa ni O
cloud.description: Multi-o infrastructure with containers, serverless, and global scalability built in.

iot.title: IoT kei na Edge Computing
iot.description: Veisemati na gacagaca, drua livaliva, kei na edge computing me baleta na Industry 4.0.

devops.title: DevOps & Platform Engineering
devops.description: CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and observability from commitment to production.

digital.title: Veisau ni Livaliva kei na Veivakasalataki
digital.description: Technology strategy, modernization roadmaps, and hands-on consulting.

cta.title: Meda Tara Cake e Dua na Ka Bibi
cta.description: Mai na vakatorocaketaki ni parokaramu ni parokaramu kei na iwali ni AI ki na iyauqaqa ni o kei na automation — eda solia na veiqaravi ni tekinolaji e veiganiti kei na nomu gagadre.

credibility.subtitle: Na Noda iTukutuku
credibility.title: Na Kena Macala, Sega ni <gradient>Yalataki</gradient>
credibility.titlePlain: Na Kena Macala, Sega ni Yalataki
credibility.description: Mai Sarajevo ki Oslo, Amsterdam, kei Berlin. Na gacagaca ni bisinisi e soli ena kena gauna, ena veigauna kece.

atlascopco.label: O IAM me baleta na Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Architected the first-ever cloud-based One Identity infrastructure for Atlas Copco on Azure Kubernetes, reducing costs while keeping enterprise compliance.

orange.label: Orange Cyberdefense Platform
orange.outcome: Vakatorocaketaka na iyauqaqa ni Azure Kubernetes, pipelines ni CI/CD, kei na veisemati ni ServiceNow me baleta na kabani ni cybersecurity levu e Iurope.

telecom.label: Telecom GIS & AR Platform
telecom.outcome: Tara cake na vatavata ni GIS na mape ni iyaya ena qele e Jamani vata kei na vakadeitaki ni coqa ka tarova na vakacaca ni iyauqaqa ni milioni na Euro.

iot.label: Cloud IoT & Edge Platform
iot.outcome: Azure IoT Hub e qarava tiko e udolu na gacagaca, Synapse cakacakataka e bilioni na iyatu ni telemetry, vata kei na aggregation ni yasana e vakalailaitaka na isau ni itukutuku ena ~90%.

drone.label: Vatavata ni Drone Autonomous
drone.outcome: Custom flight controller with 4G-to-Azure IoT Hub bridge enabling autonomous BVLOS flights for agricultural monitoring and payload delivery.

payment.label: Veivueti ena ivakarau ni sausaumi
payment.outcome: Rescued failure payment gateway for Norwegian mobile app by reverse-engineering undocumented legacy code. Sega ni sausaumi downtime ni oti na vakavoui.

game.label: AAA Game Dev Tooling
game.outcome: Tarai cake na plugin ni Maya ka vakalailaitaka na gauna ni ivakaraitaki kei na iyaloyalo 3D ena 50% ena dua na studio levu ni AAA, ka vakayagataki me dua na iyaya tudei ena pipeline ni cakacaka.

social.label: Vatavata ni Veimaliwai Yavutaki ena Vanua
social.outcome: Architected dating app for Spain's nightlife scene with geolocation matching, real-time messaging, and push notifications for a UK client.

iga.label: Multi-Tenant IGA Platform
iga.outcome: Tara cake na backend ni uto me baleta na vatavata ni veiliutaki ni ivakatakilakila ni o-native ka qarava na Fortune 500 clients vata kei na ivakarau ni ASP.NET Core Identity me baleta na NoSQL ena ivakarau ni bisinisi.

euAdjacent.title: EU-Veivolekati, Veisoliyaki e Vuravura Raraba
euAdjacent.description: Na auwa ni cakacaka ni CET kei na veika e sotavi e Norway, Netherlands, Jamani, kei na so tale.

yourEngineers.title: Nomu Idinia, Sega ni Dauvolivolitaki
yourEngineers.description: Lewe ni timi yalodina era vakacurumi ena nomu cakacaka kei na iyaya ni cakacaka. Sega na manidia ni akaude, sega na laini ni tikite.

hardwareToCloud.title: Hardware ki na O
hardwareToCloud.description: Mai na firmware ni gacagaca vakacurumi ki na pipeline ni Azure Synapse ni bisinisi. Full-stack software across every layer.

partners.subtitle: Stack ni Tekinolaji
partners.title: <gradient>Stack</gradient> vakatovolei ena ivalu
partners.description: Eda sega walega ni vakayagataka na iyaya ni cakacaka oqo — eda sa vakauta vata kei ira na ivakarau ni buli. Mai na Microsoft Azure ki na Kubernetes, era tu vei ira na noda idinia na kenadau ni vuravura dina.

cloudInfra.label: O kei na iYauqaqa
cloudInfra.description: Multi-o architecture with container orchestration and infrastructure as code.

frontend.label: Frontend
frontend.description: Modern component frameworks with type safety and optimized build tooling.

backend.label: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Enterprise-grade server platforms, systems languages, and modern API paradigms.

data.label: iTukutuku kei na Maroroi
data.description: Veimaliwai, ivola, kei na sitoa ena ivakananumi vata kei na vakasaqaqara ni itukutuku taucoko.

devops.label: DevOps kei na iyaya ni cakacaka
devops.description: CI/CD pipelines, version control, and developer productivity.

cloudNative.title: Cloud-Native ena Lalai
cloudNative.description: Na cakacaka kece e containerized, CI/CD-driven, ka tarai cake me baleta na horizontal scale mai na imatai ni siga.

fullStack.title: Maqosa ni Full-Stack
fullStack.description: Mai na React frontends ki na .NET microservices ki na Kubernetes clusters — dua na timi, muana ki na muana.

productionProven.title: Vakadinadinataki ni Buli
productionProven.description: Oqo e sega ni tekinolaji ni demo. Na iyaya yadua e volai tiko e kaukauwa kina na ivakarau dina ni veiqaravi vei ira era vakayagataka dina nikua.

faq.subtitle: Yavu ni Kila
faq.title: <gradient>Taro Dau Tarogi Wasoma</gradient>
faq.description: Na veika kece e dodonu mo kila me baleta na cakacaka vata kei na Horizon Tech

scope.question: Na cava na nomu cakacaka?
scope.answer: Eda solia na cakacaka ni tekinolaji ni itinitini: parokaramu ni bisinisi, pipeline ni AI/ML, iyauqaqa ni o, ivakarau ni IoT, DevOps automation, kei na veivakasalataki ni veisau vakalivaliva. Se o gadreva e dua na vatavata taucoko e tarai cake mai na scratch se dua na veisemati takete vata kei na nomu stack sa tu rawa, eda qarava na architecture, veivakatorocaketaki, vakatovotovo, kei na deployment.

stack.question: Na cava na nomu ituvatuva ni tekinolaji?
stack.answer: Na noda uto stack e yavutaki ena vatavata ni enterprise-grade: Azure kei na AWS me baleta na o, .NET kei na Node.js me baleta na backend, React kei na Angular me baleta na frontend, Kubernetes kei na Docker me baleta na orchestration, kei na Terraform me baleta na iyauqaqa me vaka na nabavuni. Eda cakacaka talega vakalevu vata kei na Python me baleta na cakacaka ni AI/ML, Power BI kei na Fabric me baleta na vuku ni bisinisi, kei na PostgreSQL, SQL Server, kei na MongoDB me baleta na itukutuku.

enterprise.question: O na qarava vakacava na cakacaka ni bisinisi?
enterprise.answer: Na veimaliwai yadua e tekivu ena dua na gauna ni vakadidike me vakamatatataka na rabailevu, ituvatuva, kei na milestones. O na rawata e dua na timi vakatabakidua vata kei na dua na veiliutaki vakamisini, railesuvi ni milestone wasoma, kei na curu vakadodonu vei ira na idinia era tara cake na nomu gacagaca. Eda vakamuria na agile sprints vata kei na demos ni stakeholders, maroroya na papa ni cakacaka matata, ka vakarautaka na ripote ni toso ena veimacawa.

support.question: Na cava na irairai ni veitokoni ni oti na launch?
support.answer: Eda solia na ivakatagedegede ni veitokoni tuvanaki vata kei na SLA vakamacalataki, oka kina na 24/7 na vakadikevi, isau ni veika e yaco, optimization ni cakacaka, kei na ivakatagedegede ni gacagaca. Na noda veidinadinati ni veitokoni e kovuta na bug fixes, patch ni itataqomaki, scaling ni iyauqaqa, kei na jeke ni bula proactive — veiganiti kei na nomu gauna ni cakacaka kei na gauna ni sausaumi.

integration.question: E rawa beka ni o semati vata kei na noda iyauqaqa sa tu rawa?
integration.answer: E dina sara. Eda kenadau ena vakavoui ni ivotavota makawa, API-imatai ni integrations, kei na hybrid cloud migrations. Se o gadreva mo sema ki na gacagaca ni ERP ena vanua o ya, toso mai na monoliths ki na microservices, se veivolekati na itukutuku makawa vata kei na frontends vou, sa tu vei keda na ivola ni veitosoyaki kei na veika sotavi ni veisemati me rawa ni seamless.

industries.question: Na tabana cava o sa cakacaka kina?
industries.answer: Na neitou timi sa solia na veivakatorocaketaki ena fintech, bulabula, logistics, e-commerce, kaukauwa, kei na tabana ni matanitu. Eda kila vakavinaka na veika e gadrevi ena cakacaka me vaka na PCI-DSS me baleta na sausaumi, vakasama ni HIPAA me baleta na itukutuku ni bulabula, vakamuri ni GDPR me baleta na makete ni EU, kei na telemetry ena gauna dina me baleta na IoT ni cakacaka.

engagement.question: Na cava na irairai ni cakacaka ni vakaitavi?
engagement.answer: E tekivu ena dua na kaci ni vakadidike mo kila na nomu takete kei na ituvaki vakamisini. Mai kea, eda solia e dua na ivola ni scoping vata kei na vakatutu ni architecture, timeline, kei na breakdown ni vakatubu ilavo. Ni sa vakadonui, eda na tekivu vata kei na dua na timi vakatabakidua, curu ki na nomu iyaya ni cakacaka kei na cakacaka, ka tekivuna na imatai ni sprint ena loma ni vica na siga.

faq.stillHaveQuestions: Se tiko ga na nomu taro?
faq.ctaDescription: E tiko e dua na cakacaka ena nomu vakasama? Meda veivosakitaka mada na rabailevu, gauna, kei na ilavo.
